name: Linen Quilted Basket Multi Floral Printing - Threshold™
description:
Bring extra storage to any space with this Linen Quilted Multi Floral Basket from Threshold™. Made from recycled polyester fabric with floral print, this round quilted basket is a perfect pick for stashing toys, throws and much more. Plus, the basket features a top handle that make it easy to carry around.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
